title: Per-Frame BEV Output Schema
description: Per-frame output produced by Wave 2 Worker A (Track C: bev_egomotion). Consumed by Track D (Kalman tracker), Track B (keypoint Tier-2 fallback), and Track E (degraded safety). DO NOT modify without coordinating all consumers.
coordinate_system: Topological BEV. Units are RELATIVE (ordinal), not metric. x increases rightward, y increases away from camera. No absolute metres — do not attempt to interpret as real-world distances.

clip_id.description: Must match the clip_id in the corresponding sidecar PTS file.

frame_idx.description: Zero-based frame index. Must align 1:1 with sidecar_pts frames array.

vp_t.description: Estimated vanishing point in image pixel coordinates after EMA smoothing.

alpha_t.description: EMA weight used this frame. 0.0 = full freeze (VP held from previous frame). Consumers: if alpha_t = 0.0, Tier-2 keypoint fallback is NOT available — fall through to Tier-3.

n_inliers.description: Number of RANSAC inlier vertical lines used to estimate VP this frame.

horizon_y_px.description: Estimated ground horizon y-coordinate in image pixels, derived from vp_t. Used by Track B for Tier-2 VP-projected base estimation.

homography_H_t.description: 3x3 homography matrix (row-major, 9 elements) mapping image coordinates to Topological BEV plane.

v_t.description: Frame-to-frame homography translation magnitude in pixels. sqrt(tx^2 + ty^2). Used by Track E for EIS jump detection.

delta2_eis.description: Second derivative of translation: |v_t - v_{t-1}|. 0.0 for frame_idx=0. PRIMARY signal for EIS snap detection in Track E.

rolling_shutter_theta_deg.description: Per-frame rolling shutter lean angle theta in degrees, computed as arctan(vx * tr / H). Provided as a convenience — Track B uses this directly in geometry checks.

bev_gate_bases.description: Optional. BEV-projected positions of detected gate bases this frame (if detector output is available at BEV stage).
